title: JUL-292 The BEAUTIFUL WIFE 05 Ririka Mori, 32 Years Old, AV Debut!! - Mori Ririka
description: The 5th installment of the "First Shot" series of beautiful married women whose appearance and eros are one rank higher! !! A noble woman who wants to be a mistress! !! In the third year of marriage, the active receptionist "Rika Mori" who works in Nishi-Azabu makes her 32-year-old AV debut! !! A married woman Medusa with an adult sex appeal that makes a man fall in love just by meeting her eyes! !! A mysterious girlfriend who doesn't talk too much, but greedy sex tells everything! !! The first unfaithful real document 3 production of a married woman who has lived a life unrelated to AV! !!
